# Try without semicolons - write each triple explicitly
q = """PREFIX sosa: <http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/>
PREFIX sio: <http://semanticscience.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?obs ?value ?unit ?time WHERE {
  GRAPH <http://localhost:8080/graph/observations> {
    ?obs a sosa:Observation .
    ?obs sosa:madeBySensor <http://localhost:8080/entity/sensor-cv-delta> .
    ?obs sosa:resultTime ?time .
    ?obs sio:has-attribute ?mv .
    ?mv sio:has-value ?value .
    ?mv sio:has-unit ?u .
    ?u rdfs:label ?unit .
  }
}
LIMIT 5"""
result = sparql_query(q)
print("SIO result:", result)

# Also try simple result pattern without semicolons
q2 = """PREFIX sosa: <http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/>
SELECT ?obs ?result ?time WHERE {
  GRAPH <http://localhost:8080/graph/observations> {
    ?obs a sosa:Observation .
    ?obs sosa:madeBySensor <http://localhost:8080/entity/sensor-cv-delta> .
    ?obs sosa:hasSimpleResult ?result .
    ?obs sosa:resultTime ?time .
  }
}
LIMIT 5"""
result2 = sparql_query(q2)
print("Simple result:", result2)
